what_it_does: MCP server that lets AI assistants call Tripo generation and import results into Blender.
succinct_summary: High Morgan relevance because it exposes Tripo 3D generation to agent workflows.
possible_use: Let Morgan/agent tooling request 3D asset generation and route outputs into Blender automation.
important_notes: Alpha project; currently focused on Blender addon integration and requires Tripo credentials.
